rules.logic: BIOC(DRSUAPI Replication Request From Non-DC Host) OR BIOC(Windows Event 4662 — Replicating Directory Changes by Non-DC Principal) OR BIOC(Mimikatz dcsync Command-Line Pattern)
rules.name: Credential Access — DCSync Detected

rules.logic: CR-CRED-0001 (LSASS dump) AND CR-CRED-0002 (DCSync) on same actor within 4h — promotes to Critical incident with auto-isolation.
rules.name: Credential Access — Chained LSASS + DCSync Within 4h
